name: Shift Knob for Mazda MX-5 Miata 2nd gen NB 1999 to 2005 6-Speed Black
description:
Weighted Knob that Won't Burn You

This Mazda MX-5 Miata shift knob is a three piece design. The core of the knob is 11oz of machined stainless steel, making it satisfyingly heavy while running through the gears. Most weighted knobs are all steel, but the trouble is that they get very hot or very cold depending on the season. If you have accidentally touched the steel belt buckle on a hot day you know what we mean. The outer portion of the knob is machined from black acetal, so it still gets warm, but not like that belt buckle...

Why Weight?

You probably already enjoy your manual transmission. Why would you drive a car like this any other way? Switch out the knob and we promise you will begin to love shifting even more. The weight of this knob will not go unnoticed and the momentum will power you through every shift. It's hard to describe, so try it for yourself! Our shipping and returns are both free, installing it is easy, so order one up and return it if you are not happy with it.

Built Right

The outer portion of the main ball is machined from Polyoxymethylene, it is smooth and really great to the touch. The core, which includes a machined groove to hold the shift boot, is stainless steel, and is heavy and strong. The top cap is powdercoated after being machined from aluminum and is available in red or black.

Fitment

This knob is designed for the Mazda MX-5 Miata 2nd gen NB. However, the M10 x 1.25 thread will fit a wide range of other vehicles. If you don't drive a Miata, find one for your car here or send us an email and we can find one for you. This knob will fit all 2nd gen NB MX-5 Miata's from 1999 to 2005.

Cap It Off

Not a fan of the 6-speed pattern? Want something to set yours apart from the crowd? We have additional colors and designs available here! We can even engrave a non-copyrighted/non-trademarked, custom image if you have a design you would like to use. Just send an email to our Customer Support and we'll give you the low-down!

Comes With Free Customer Service!

To seal the deal, we here at CravenSpeed consider ourselves the best in the world at customer service. Everyone on our small team is dedicated to providing you with the absolute best customer experience possible. We offer free domestic shipping, and orders placed before 2:00 p.m. PST M-F will be shipped the same day. We also offer free, no hassle returns for up to one year after the purchase date. If you need any help, have any questions, or just want to chat, our world class support crew is available by phone , or email .
